message:
test(codec): conformance roundtrip for uncovered MovePaneToNewTab + SpawnV2 branches

Fills two gaps the main proptest_codec_roundtrip.rs suite leaves open
— the last PDU variant without a call site, and a branch of an
existing test's strategy that is never actually hit.

Adds frankenterm/codec/tests/proptest_codec_uncovered_pdus.rs with
two proptest roundtrips:

  * `move_pane_to_new_tab_request_json_and_pdu_roundtrip` — covers
    `Pdu::MovePaneToNewTab(_)`. The sibling `MovePaneToNewTabResponse`
    had coverage but the request variant was the only entry in the
    `pdu!{}` registry at codec/src/lib.rs:596 with no test invoking
    `Pdu::MovePaneToNewTab(_)`.

  * `spawn_v2_with_command_json_and_pdu_roundtrip` — covers
    `Pdu::SpawnV2 { command: Some(CommandBuilder), .. }`. The existing
    `spawn_v2_json_and_pdu_roundtrip` is fed by a strategy that pins
    `command: None`, so the `Some(CommandBuilder)` branch of the wire
    format — the branch that actually exercises the CommandBuilder
    env-map serde adapter touched by ft-z5dxg / ft-rrrn5 — slipped
    through the suite. Generates a CommandBuilder via `env_clear` +
    `env` + `arg` + `cwd` so the captured env map holds only
    caller-supplied keys (no host process env leakage that would
    make the test flaky across machines).

Supporting changes in frankenterm/codec/src/lib.rs:

  * Derive `Clone` on every PDU wire struct via the standard
    `#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize, PartialEq, Debug, Clone)]`
    pattern (68 structs). The existing test suite is written against
    the assumption that PDU values can be duplicated for
    `prop_assert_eq!` + `assert_pdu_roundtrip` side-by-side — the
    assumption was not backed up by the actual derives, which is
    part of why the sibling file accumulated 131 compile errors.
    `CommandBuilder` already derives Clone (verified in
    frankenterm/pty/src/cmdbuilder.rs:201), so `SpawnV2` reaches
    Clone transitively.
  * Add `Clone` to `SerializedLines` (its derive stanza diverged
    from the standard pattern so the bulk sed missed it; added
    manually).
  * Patch the 59 `prop_assert_eq!(decoded_json, payload);` sites in
    proptest_codec_roundtrip.rs to pre-clone so the subsequent
    `assert_pdu_roundtrip(serial, Pdu::X(payload))` no longer
    use-after-moves. The file still has pre-existing u64/usize
    strategy-type drift (69 remaining E0308 mismatches across legacy
    strategies) that is pane 3's abandoned work and out of scope
    for this ship — the new tests live in their own binary so they
    are independently buildable and runnable.

Verified: `cargo test --manifest-path frankenterm/codec/Cargo.toml
--test proptest_codec_uncovered_pdus` → `test result: ok. 2 passed;
0 failed` in 5.50s at /tmp/ft-pane6-target.
